positive: A stylized, high-contrast cosmic woodland scene. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and ancient, sprawling trees whose roots form intricate, geometric patterns. Incorporate minimalist crescent moons and abstract constellations that connect the elements. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep sapphire blue, glowing cyan, and ethereal gold against a solid black background. The artwork must have sharp, clean silhouettes, strong lines, and resemble high-end vector illustration suitable for screen printing on apparel. Studio quality, ethereal, celestial, symmetrical composition, detailed pattern design.
